title: Brailix diagnostic warning
description: One serialized diagnostic — an entry of WarningCollector.to_list() and of the warnings array in TranslationResult.proofread_json(). Optional fields appear exactly when set (empty candidates / anchor are omitted, not emitted empty).

code.description: Stable machine-readable code (SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE); front-ends key i18n and filtering on it.

surface.description: The source text the diagnostic is about (possibly truncated by the emitter).

candidates.description: Alternative readings / fixes a front-end can offer.

anchor.description: Structured location for inputs with no character-level coordinate (music: part_id / measure_number; embedded runs: embedded_text / domain).
